missing_security_headers.strict-transport-security: Add HSTS to force browsers to use HTTPS.
missing_security_headers.content-security-policy: Add a Content-Security-Policy to reduce XSS and injection impact.
missing_security_headers.x-frame-options: Add X-Frame-Options or frame-ancestors to reduce clickjacking risk.
missing_security_headers.referrer-policy: Add Referrer-Policy to limit sensitive URL leakage.
missing_security_headers.permissions-policy: Add Permissions-Policy to restrict browser features.

header_issues.title: No Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy
header_issues.description: Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy is not set, so the page shares a browsing-context group with cross-origin openers (a building block for cross-origin isolation).

header_issues.title: No Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy
header_issues.description: Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy is not set, so other origins can embed this site's resources.
header_issues.recommendation: Set Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin or same-site where appropriate.

header_issues.title: No Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy
header_issues.description: Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy is not set, which is required for cross-origin isolation.
header_issues.recommendation: Set Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy: require-corp to enable cross-origin isolation.

findings.title: HTTP does not redirect to HTTPS
findings.description: Plain HTTP requests are not redirected to HTTPS, leaving traffic exposed.
findings.recommendation: Configure a 301 redirect from http:// to https:// for all paths.

remediation.title: Redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS with a 301

findings.title: No Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy
findings.description: Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy is not set, so the page shares a browsing-context group with cross-origin openers (a building block for cross-origin isolation).

findings.title: No Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy
findings.description: Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy is not set, so other origins can embed this site's resources.
findings.recommendation: Set Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin or same-site where appropriate.

findings.title: No Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy
findings.description: Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy is not set, which is required for cross-origin isolation.
findings.recommendation: Set Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy: require-corp to enable cross-origin isolation.

findings.title: Missing strict-transport-security header
findings.description: The HTTPS response does not include strict-transport-security.
findings.recommendation: Add HSTS to force browsers to use HTTPS.

remediation.title: Send HSTS on every HTTPS response
remediation.snippet:
Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload

# nginx
add_header Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload" always;
# apache / litespeed (.htaccess)
Header always set Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload"

findings.title: Missing content-security-policy header
findings.description: The HTTPS response does not include content-security-policy.
findings.recommendation: Add a Content-Security-Policy to reduce XSS and injection impact.

remediation.title: Start with a strict Content-Security-Policy, then loosen as needed
remediation.snippet:
Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'self'; base-uri 'self'

# Deploy in report-only mode first to find breakage:
Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only: default-src 'self'; report-uri /csp-report

findings.title: Missing x-content-type-options header
findings.description: The HTTPS response does not include x-content-type-options.

remediation.title: Add the x-content-type-options header

findings.title: Missing x-frame-options header
findings.description: The HTTPS response does not include x-frame-options.
findings.recommendation: Add X-Frame-Options or frame-ancestors to reduce clickjacking risk.

remediation.title: Add the x-frame-options header

findings.title: Missing referrer-policy header
findings.description: The HTTPS response does not include referrer-policy.
findings.recommendation: Add Referrer-Policy to limit sensitive URL leakage.

remediation.title: Add the referrer-policy header

findings.title: Missing permissions-policy header
findings.description: The HTTPS response does not include permissions-policy.
findings.recommendation: Add Permissions-Policy to restrict browser features.

remediation.title: Add the permissions-policy header

findings.title: No security.txt published
findings.description: The site does not publish a /.well-known/security.txt contact policy (RFC 9116).
findings.recommendation: Publish a security.txt with a security contact and disclosure policy.

remediation.title: Publish /.well-known/security.txt
remediation.snippet:
# https://example.com/.well-known/security.txt
Contact: mailto:security@example.com
Expires: 2027-01-01T00:00:00Z
Policy: https://example.com/security-policy
Preferred-Languages: en

findings.title: MTA-STS is not configured
findings.description: The domain does not publish MTA-STS, so sending servers cannot require TLS for inbound mail.
findings.recommendation: Publish an MTA-STS policy to require TLS for inbound email.

remediation.title: Publish MTA-STS: a DNS record plus a policy file served over HTTPS
remediation.snippet:
# 1) DNS TXT record
_mta-sts.example.com.    IN  TXT  "v=STSv1; id=20260101000000"

# 2) https://mta-sts.example.com/.well-known/mta-sts.txt
version: STSv1
mode: enforce
mx: mail.example.com
max_age: 604800

findings.title: No SMTP TLS Reporting (TLS-RPT)
findings.description: No TLS-RPT record is published, so you receive no reports about inbound TLS failures.
findings.recommendation: Publish a TLS-RPT record to receive inbound SMTP TLS failure reports.

remediation.title: Publish a TLS-RPT record to receive inbound TLS failure reports

findings.title: No BIMI record published
findings.description: DMARC is enforced but no BIMI record is published, so your logo will not show in supporting inboxes.
findings.recommendation: Publish a BIMI record (and a VMC) to display your brand logo in supporting mail clients.

remediation.title: Publish a BIMI record pointing at your logo
remediation.snippet:
default._bimi.example.com.    IN  TXT  "v=BIMI1; l=https://example.com/bimi-logo.svg; a=https://example.com/vmc.pem"
# The logo must be a square SVG Tiny PS; a VMC (a=) is required by Gmail and others.

findings.title: No CAA records
findings.description: Without CAA records, any certificate authority may issue certificates for the domain.
findings.recommendation: Publish CAA records naming only the CAs you use.

remediation.title: Restrict certificate issuance with CAA records
remediation.snippet:
example.com.    IN  CAA  0 issue "letsencrypt.org"
example.com.    IN  CAA  0 issuewild ";"
example.com.    IN  CAA  0 iodef "mailto:security@example.com"
# List every CA you actually use; the wildcard ";" forbids wildcard issuance.

findings.title: DANE/TLSA is not configured
findings.description: DNSSEC is enabled but no TLSA record is published, so DANE is not pinning the certificate.
findings.recommendation: Publish a TLSA record at _443._tcp to pin the certificate via DANE.

remediation.title: Publish a TLSA record (requires DNSSEC)
remediation.snippet:
_443._tcp.example.com.    IN  TLSA  3 1 1 <sha256-of-the-cert-public-key>
# 3 1 1 = DANE-EE, SubjectPublicKeyInfo, SHA-256. Generate the hash from your leaf cert.

findings.title: 1 subdomain(s) found in certificate transparency logs
findings.description: Certificate transparency logs publicly record every hostname issued a certificate. These make up the attack surface beyond the scanned host.
findings.recommendation: Review the list and retire or protect any host that should not be public.

findings.title: 16 lookalike domain(s) are registered
findings.description: Domains that closely resemble yours are registered and resolve. These are commonly used for phishing and brand impersonation.
findings.recommendation: Monitor the closest variants, defensively register the riskiest, and watch for abuse.

remediation.title: Defend against lookalike domains
remediation.snippet:
# Registered lookalikes found:
  - e-xample.com
  - eample.com
  - eaxmple.com
  - eexample.com
  - ex-ample.com
  - examle.com
  - examlpe.com
  - exammple.com
  - examp-le.com
  - exampe.com

# 1. Monitor new registrations and certificates that mimic your brand.
# 2. Defensively register the closest variants.
# 3. Report active phishing to the registrar and Google Safe Browsing.
